items.title: Coordinate virtual meeting between US Bank (Meghan Kober) and Echelon AI founders
items.context: Email from meghan.kober@usbank.com on May 14: 'Please send over some dates and times that would work for you. Looking forward to connecting!' — US Bank wants to schedule a virtual meeting with Eddie and Rahul after Fan's introduction.

items.title: Follow up on IndyKite <> Hitachi Ventures intro scheduling
items.context: Email from lasse.andresen@indykite.com on May 13: 'I would love to chat sooner rather than later. Clare can assist in finding the best time for us.' — Lasse wants to quickly connect with Gayathri at Hitachi Ventures after Derek's intro. Series A process progressing with 11 VC firms reviewing and 1 draft term sheet.

items.title: Align with SMBC (Ryo) on Opti key messages for AD management meeting
items.context: Email from ryo.ishii@smbcgroup.com on May 16: 'I'd love to circle back as we prepare for the upcoming AD management meeting, especially to align on the key messages for Donna.' — SMBC wants to coordinate messaging on Opti ahead of an internal meeting with Donna.

items.title: Review Prism Layer seed round pitch deck (v4)
items.context: Email from simone@prismlayer.ai on May 15: 'Just finished our seed round pitch deck. Talk soon!' — PL Pitch Deck v4 attached for team review ahead of upcoming in-person meeting.

items.title: Prep for in-person meeting with Simone Garreau (Prism Layer) on May 26
items.context: Calendar event 'In-Person Meeting + Zoom' on May 26 at 10:30am at Fin Capital offices (1 Sansome St Suite 3950) with Logan, Derek, Jake, Claire, and Simone attending.

items.title: Prep for GetReal & FinCapital Investor Briefing on May 20
items.context: Calendar event 'GetReal & FinCapital | Investor Briefing' on May 20 3-4pm ET with Matt Moynahan and GetReal Labs team — 1-hour briefing with Jake, Lissette, and Derek.
